assets.alt: Flat head-on direction marker and evidence surface on a rose and coral mesh background
assets.caption: Founder-led content and employee-generated content solve different LinkedIn operating problems.
assets.generation_method: built-in image_gen, saved post-local as PNG
assets.notes: Regenerated with the flat head-on two-color Sell In Public liquid-glass hero process. Background uses one main color plus one close complementary color; graphic is front-facing with no isometric or angled perspective.
assets.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide blog hero for Sell In Public blog, final should work as a 1897x829 landscape crop
Source context from article: Founder-led content works when the market needs a clear executive point of view. Employee-generated content works when buyers need proof from people doing the work. A useful system uses both: a founder can explain why the company sees the market differently, while a sales engineer, product lead, customer success manager, or operator can show what that belief looks like in real work. The wrong move is forcing one model to do every job.
Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor inferred from that article context: founder direction connected to team proof. Use one or two relevant visual elements only: one flat direction marker and one flat evidence surface, both viewed head-on.
Style reference: Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style. Generated raster PNG. Background uses one main color plus at most one close complementary color. Matte translucent liquid-glass shapes. Simple head-on flat UI. Consistent white outline weight. Clean negative space. Subtle grain.
Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1897x829. One centered head-on graphic with quiet space around it. All glass/white graphics must be completely flat and viewed straight-on, like a 2D interface parallel to the image plane.
Scene/backdrop: Soft mesh gradient using only rose and coral. No third color family. Blend smoothly without hard edges.
Subject: One simple front-facing white outlined direction marker beside one flat liquid-glass evidence surface with sparse abstract white marks. No labels, no words, no metrics.
Detail density: Very low. Simple, spacious, specific, editorial B2B.
Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, charts, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards, overcomplicated UIs, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, 3D depth, shadows, or three-quarter UI view.
